a_image.alt: Vaporwave style mood board — Aesthetic · Digital Nostalgia

sections.a_eyebrow: Nostalgic · Gradient · Neon · Moody · Dark Mode
sections.a_description: Pastel neon gradients, purple depths, and the melancholic beauty of 90s consumer culture filtered through a digital haze — Vaporwave transforms nostalgia into an aesthetic philosophy. Hot pink and cyan accents glow against deep purple-blue backgrounds, creating the visual equivalent of a deserted mall at midnight, where forgotten Muzak echoes through marble corridors lined with palm trees.

This internet-born aesthetic powers music label sites, retro-digital art galleries, aesthetic community platforms, and nostalgia-driven brand experiences. You'll see it on lo-fi beat channels, retrowave music pages, internet art collections, and anywhere that celebrates the eerie beauty of obsolete technology and the digital ghost of 90s consumer optimism — where every pixel feels like a love letter to something we never actually had.

The dreamy, retro-digital aesthetic of vaporwave — pastel neon gradients, Roman statues in cyberspace, and the melancholic beauty of 90s consumer culture refracted through a digital prism. Background: deep purple-blue (#1a0a2e) — the infinite digital void. The .inner panel has a gradient background (linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255,113,206,0.1), rgba(1,205,254,0.1))) with a 1px border (rgba(255,113,206,0.3)) and 8px border-radius — translucent and neon-tinted. Colors: hot pink (#ff71ce) as the primary accent — the signature vaporwave pink of neon signs and 90s graphics. Cyan (#01cdfe) as secondary. Soft pink-white (#ffe3f5) for headings, muted lavender (#b8a0c8) for body text. The aesthetic is nostalgic and surreal — consumer capitalism's ghost haunting an empty digital mall at 3am. Set in Bai Jamjuree — a modern sans-serif with slightly condensed proportions that echo Japanese-inspired vaporwave typography. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, color #ffe3f5. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 3px letter-spacing, color #ff71ce. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.7, color #b8a0c8. Buttons: primary — hot pink (#ff71ce), dark text (#1a0a2e), 4px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, cyan border (#01cdfe). Alternatives: VT323 (retro pixel), Press Start 2P (pixel art).
{What this palette represents — the core identity}
